reviews.comment:
Una sola playera atiende todos los surtidores, limpia vidrios, cobra y abre los depósitos de los que no se bajan del auto a hacerlo. Conclusión, el "tour de la angustia" para repostar

(Translated by Google)
A single driver mans all the pumps, cleans windows, collects money, and opens the tanks of those who don't get out of their cars to do so. In conclusion, the "anxiety tour" for refueling.

reviews.comment:
Tenia que pagar con modo y nunca me supieron generar el QR de modo y eso que dicen que estan adheridos. Por ende tuve que pagar en efectivo y me perdi la promocion, por ende $10.000.
El encargado fue amable pero no me supo dar ninguna solucion.
Lamentablemente no volvere

(Translated by Google)
I had to pay by card, but they were never able to generate the QR code for me, even though they claim to be affiliated with the system. Therefore, I had to pay in cash and missed out on the promotion, losing $10,000.

The manager was friendly but couldn't offer any solution.
Unfortunately, I won't be returning.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREXzhTeGNBEAE

reviews.comment:
No aceptan modo y avisan después que cargaste.
Te meten el cuento que la empresa no les pone el postner, siempre tienen problemas al momento de pagar con cualquier medio electrónico.
Cuando te pasan para pagar si no miras bien, te cobran el doble.
La atención es de cuarta

(Translated by Google)
They don't accept payment methods and only notify you after you've already paid.
They tell you the company hasn't provided the card reader; they always have problems when paying with any electronic method.
When they take you to pay, if you don't look closely, they'll charge you double.
The service is terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREci1uVFRBEAE

reviews.comment:
El día 27/2/24 dejé el auto para hacer cambio de aceite y filtros, al día siguiente observo que el auto pierde aceite, lo llevo de inmediato lo tienen por dos días y me dicen que está roto el cárter y no pueden hacer nada. Lo llevo a mi mecánico y me muestra que la rotura es al lado del tapón, fue necesario soldar y volver a hacer la rosca, YPF ACA no reconoce haber realizado un mal servicio y no se hacen cargo de la reparación.

(Translated by Google)
On February 27, 2024, I left my car for an oil and filter change. The next day, I noticed it was leaking oil. I took it back immediately, and they kept it for two days before telling me the oil pan was cracked and they couldn't do anything. I took it to my mechanic, who showed me the crack was next to the drain plug. It was necessary to weld it and re-thread it. YPF ACA denies any wrongdoing and refuses to cover the repair.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREel9LMGpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Veo que nadie opina sobre el servicio mecánico del ACA. Tienen el auto más de una semana, faltan los mecánicos por dengue, falta el chico de la moto para los repuestos🤌🏻, faltan por paro de colectivo🤌🏻 un aguantadero de vagos. Como se nota que llegan a fin de mes y no les falta para comer, no entiendo como una empresa cómo esta permite este tipo de cosas❌

(Translated by Google)
I see no one's commenting on the ACA's mechanical service. They've had their cars for over a week, the mechanics are out with dengue fever, the guy with the motorcycle for spare parts is out 🤌🏻, there's a bus strike 🤌🏻, it's a hangout for slackers. It's obvious they're barely making ends meet and have enough to eat. I don't understand how a company like this allows this kind of thing ❌
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURENmQtMU93EAE
